app_release_notes: v0.18.0 - Import from phone: measure your groups in the Loadscope phone app and pull them straight into your load on the desktop over Wi-Fi, each target matched to its charge. New on the Measure tab: pick a Powder or Seating-depth ladder, and enter a custom bullet diameter.

mac.app_release_notes: v0.18.0 - Import from phone: measure your groups in the Loadscope phone app and pull them straight into your load on the desktop over Wi-Fi, each target matched to its charge. New on the Measure tab: pick a Powder or Seating-depth ladder, and enter a custom bullet diameter.

windows.app_release_notes: v0.18.0 - Import from phone: measure your groups in the Loadscope phone app and pull them straight into your load on the desktop over Wi-Fi, each target matched to its charge. New on the Measure tab: pick a Powder or Seating-depth ladder, and enter a custom bullet diameter.
